hero_subtitle: SFTY preserves audit evidence and manages case workflows by connecting provider outputs, applying rules, and logging decisions across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening data.

problem_title: Audit evidence becomes hard to preserve
problem_description: Compliance teams often struggle to maintain a complete and traceable audit trail when case creation depends on fragmented provider outputs and manual workflows. This limits operational visibility and slows review processes across both automated and manual compliance cases.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links provider checks, regulatory rules, manual reviews and decision logs into a unified workflow that preserves audit evidence for every automatically or manually created compliance case.
workflow_title: From provider checks to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects provider outputs through rule application, review routing, case creation, decision recording and evidence preservation within one aligned compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Evidence-ready case control

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows maintain decision and evidence logs

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured compliance workflows, enabling teams to manage risk, review cases, record decisions and align regulatory rules within a connected operational layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support case creation workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY automates case creation by routing alerts and provider results, applying internal rules, and linking customer, wallet and transaction data to streamline review and decision logging.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting documents as evidence-grade records to support review readiness and clear audit trails for compliance activities.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into one cohesive compliance workflow without replacing core systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY enhances existing providers by structuring their data into workflows, cases and reports, serving as a compliance control layer rather than a replacement.
final_title: Structure audit-ready case workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY preserves evidence, applies rules, and manages case creation for VASP compliance operations.
